## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- **Platform**: [Web / iOS / Android]
- **Browser** (if web): [Chrome / Safari / Firefox]

- **App Version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **Device**: [e.g., iPhone 16, Pixel 9, MacBook Pro]

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
